request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are still relying on outdated systems while we modernize? Supporting NATO isn't just about spending - it's about ensuring our partners can actually defend themselves. When allies can't contribute effectively, the burden falls disproportionately on us. Let's push for smarter commitments that ensure real security for everyone. #StrongerAlliances #SharedSecurity
